title: Upload a CSV and open the completed analysis dashboard
description: An authenticated user can upload a CSV from history, start analysis, see progress, and arrive automatically at the completed session dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify upload or analysis progress is visible
Verify the completed session dashboard is displayed

title: Sign in and reach analysis history
description: A returning user can sign in with valid credentials and land on their analysis history page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the analyses history page is displayed

title: Create a new account successfully
description: A new visitor can register with valid credentials and see confirmation that the account was created or needs email review.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a new valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Verify an account creation confirmation or email review message is visible

title: Redirect unauthenticated visitors away from protected pages
description: A guest trying to open a protected page is redirected to the login page instead of seeing private content.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Review completed session content across tabs
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open a completed session dashboard and view the session content across the main tabs.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the session summary, charts, insights, forecast, and chat content are displayed

title: Switch between dashboard tabs on a completed session
description: An authenticated user can move across the dashboard tabs and see the relevant analysis content load for each section.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the selected dashboard content is displayed for the current tab

title: View completed analysis history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open their analysis history and see prior analyses listed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Switch between dashboard tabs
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can switch among dashboard tabs and see the selected content update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the selected section updates as each tab is opened

title: Open a completed session from history
description: An authenticated user can return to history and reopen an existing completed analysis session.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the session dashboard is displayed

title: Open a prior analysis from history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can reopen an existing analysis from history and reach its dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the analysis dashboard is displayed

title: Browse and manage prior analyses in history
description: A returning user can search, star, rename, and delete prior analyses from the history page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the history list reflects the updated analysis state

title: Ask a dataset question in chat and receive an answer
description: An authenticated user can submit a dataset question in the dashboard chat and see an AI-generated response.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an AI-generated chat answer is visible

title: Ask a dataset question in chat
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can ask a question about the dataset in chat and receive a conversational answer.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the chat input with a question about the dataset
Verify the user message is displayed
Verify an assistant response is displayed

title: Search history for a specific analysis
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can search their history and see only matching analyses.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the history search field with a filename or label from a prior analysis

title: Download analysis deliverables from a completed session
description: An authenticated user can download the cleaned CSV, notebook, and PDF report from a completed analysis session.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the session download options are available

title: Star an analysis from history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can toggle the star on an analysis and see the starred state update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Toggle the star on an analysis
Verify the analysis is marked as starred

title: Delete an analysis from history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can delete a prior analysis and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the analysis is removed from the list

title: Show only starred analyses
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can filter history to starred analyses and see only starred items.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify only starred analyses are displayed

title: Use a suggested question in chat
description: An authenticated user can choose a suggested question in chat and receive a relevant AI response.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an AI-generated chat answer is visible

title: Rename an analysis in history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can rename a prior analysis and see the updated label in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the label field with a new custom name
Verify the updated label is displayed

title: Download the PDF report from a completed session
description: This verifies that a user can download the PDF report output from a completed analysis session and the download option is available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a completed analysis session dashboard
Verify the report download option is available

title: Download the cleaned dataset from a completed session
description: This verifies that a user can download the cleaned CSV output from a completed analysis session and the download option is available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a completed analysis session dashboard
Verify the cleaned dataset download option is available

title: Download the Jupyter notebook from a completed session
description: This verifies that a user can download the Jupyter notebook output from a completed analysis session and the download option is available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a completed analysis session dashboard
Verify the notebook download option is available

title: Prevent registration with an already used email
description: A visitor who tries to register with an email that is already in use sees an inline error and does not complete signup.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an already registered email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Verify a duplicate account error is visible

title: Block access to another user's session
description: This verifies that an authenticated user who opens a session that belongs to another account sees an access denied state and a way back to analyses.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to a session dashboard that belongs to another account
Verify an access denied message is displayed
Verify a link back to analyses is displayed

title: Reject incorrect sign in credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials on the login page sees an authentication error and cannot access the app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a valid email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Validate chat character limit
description: This verifies that an authenticated user sees validation when entering more than the allowed chat character limit.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the chat input with text that exceeds the character limit
Verify a chat input validation error is visible

title: Reject an invalid email during registration
description: A visitor entering an invalid email format on sign up sees an inline validation error and cannot proceed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email format
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Reject mismatched signup passwords
description: A visitor who enters different password values on sign up sees a validation error and cannot create the account.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a new valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with a different password
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Reject a non-CSV upload
description: An authenticated user who uploads a non-CSV file sees a validation message and cannot start analysis.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a file type validation message is visible

title: Reject an oversized CSV upload
description: An authenticated user who uploads a CSV above the allowed size sees a validation message and cannot continue.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Upload a CSV file larger than the allowed size
Verify a file size validation message is visible
